questionsAsked: What is the primary job-to-be-done for the context graph?
How do you feel about the stdlib-only constraint for this feature?
What languages must the context graph support?
constraints: install.sh is the single distribution mechanism
Must integrate with existing SQLite memory engine
Must enhance existing workflow commands, not replace them

candidates.name: Full Stdlib Port (Python-First MVP)
candidates.summary: Port axon's graph model and core algorithms using only stdlib. Python ast module for parsing, SQLite for storage, pure Python BFS/BM25/community detection. Python-only initially.
risks: ast module has limited cross-module call resolution — mitigated by confidence scoring
Community detection without igraph produces simpler clusters — label propagation is adequate
Large codebases may be slow — mitigated by SQLite indexes and incremental re-indexing
mvp: Graph model + SQLite storage + Python parser (structure, symbols, calls, imports)
Impact analysis + dead code detection + change coupling
Workflow integration: /review blast radius, /plan scope hints, /ship safety

candidates.name: Layered Dependencies (Progressive Enhancement)
candidates.summary: Stdlib core that works everywhere, with optional pip install for tree-sitter (multi-language), igraph (communities), fastembed (semantic search). Feature detection at import time.
risks: Two code paths to maintain (core + optional)
Testing matrix doubles with/without each optional dep
User confusion about which features require what
mvp: Same stdlib core as Direction A

candidates.name: Minimal Deps Port (tree-sitter only)
candidates.summary: Accept tree-sitter as the single external dependency for multi-language parsing. Everything else stdlib. Python + TS + JS from day one.
risks: tree-sitter binary wheels may not exist for all platforms
Breaks zero-deps guarantee — alienates some users
mvp: Graph model + SQLite storage + tree-sitter parsers
Impact analysis + dead code + change coupling

candidates.name: Research-First Prototype
candidates.summary: Single-file prototype (<400 lines) to validate graph-powered insights improve /review and /plan quality before committing to full port.
risks: Throwaway code if full port proceeds
Doesn't test persistence, search, or community detection
Adds validation delay to a clear-intent feature
mvp: Wire into /review as experimental output (1 task)
